MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.persistent_agent
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/persistent_agent.py (1244 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Persistent Agent Loop (Shadow Agents)
==================================================

Each agent runs continuously in its own tmux session, actively:
- Watching the shared dialogue bus for messages from other agents
- Responding to discussions and debates
- Proposing ideas and critiques
-

CLASSES:
- DialogueBus: Shared communication channel for all agents.

Agents post messages here and watc
  Methods: def post_message(self, agent_id: str, content: str, msg_type: str='thought')
  Methods: def get_recent_messages(self, since_timestamp: str=None, exclude_agent: str=None) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def get_messages_for_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def set_topic(self, topic: str, proposer: str)
  Methods: def get_current_topic(self) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: def register_agent(self, agent_id: str)
  Methods: def get_active_agents(self) -> list[str]
- TaskQueue: Shared task queue for the collective.

Agents can:
- Add tasks they think need d
  Methods: def add_task(self, description: str, proposed_by: str, priority: int=5) -> dict
  Methods: def claim_task(self, agent_id: str) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: def complete_task(self, task_id: str, result: str)
  Methods: def get_pending_tasks(self) -> list[dict]
- PersistentAgent: A continuously running agent that participates in collective dialogue.

SHADOW M
  Methods: async def query(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int=None) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def query_with_context(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int=1000, include_history: bool=True) ->
  Methods: def shutdown(self)
  Methods: async def think(self) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def respond_to_message(self, message: dict) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def run_loop(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_shadow_agents() -> list[str]
- def is_shadow_agent_active(agent_id: str) -> bool
- async def call_shadow_agent(agent_id: str, prompt: str, max_tokens: int=None, timeout: float=60.0) -> Optional[Tuple[str
- def register_shadow_agents_with_deliberation()
- async def main()
- async def ask_agent(agent_id: str, question: str, max_tokens: int=None) -> Optional[str]
- async def ask_collective(question: str, agents: list[str]=None) -> dict[str, str]
- async def get_agent_status() -> dict
- def spawn_agent_in_background(agent_id: str) -> bool
